plan.failureSummary: The test failed during a deterministic run because the survey form layout changed. The cached automation expected a 'Last Name' field, but the current UI (labeled 'Set 2') only contains 'Your Name', 'Contact Email', and other different fields.
observedIndicators: UI redesign/variation detected: Failure screenshot shows 'Set 2' with 'Your Name' vs cached 'Last Name' selector
Semantic intent 'Fill out all survey questions' is highly flexible and adaptable
Historical pass rate of 57% with alternating success/failure suggests environment or UI instability

remediationSteps.details: Clear the page.ai cache for this flow. This will force the autonomous agent to re-scan the page and adapt to the 'Set 2' form layout instead of relying on stale selectors from 'Set 1'.
If the survey sets are predictable, consider adding logic to handle different form variations or increasing the AI's awareness of form versions in the prompt.

plan.notes: The application 'unstable-survey' appears to serve different form 'sets' dynamically. The failure screenshot confirms the UI is in 'Set 2' which does not match the cached selectors from a previous successful run (likely 'Set 1'). Since the AI instruction is semantically flexible ('Fill out all survey questions'), clearing the cache will allow the agent to adapt to the new form structure.
